title: RITES Notification 2026 - Apply Online for Deputy General Manager Posts
description: Rail India Technical and Economic Services (RITES) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for Deputy General Manager Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the B.E/ B.Tech in Mechanical Engineering can grab this chance and apply for these posts. Here, we mentioned more about the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application fee, and how to apply for the RITES Notification 2026 .
